title: lasianthus sylvestris var. latifolius
intro: Lasianthus sylvestris var. latifolius, also known as the large-leaved lasianthus, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus sylvestris var. latifolius include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
